channel.title: Link to anchor tag on different page
channel.description:
I'm trying to create a link from a home page to an anchor section on a different page. It seems like this isn't possible with frontity, as when linking to "/about#something", it will only go to "/about/", add the trailing slash automatically, and then add the "#something" afterwords, which doesn't scroll to that section.
Is there a solution for this?

item.title: Link to anchor tag on different page
item.dc:creator: meaghan1
item.description:
I’m trying to create a link from a home page to an anchor section on a different page. It seems like this isn’t possible with frontity, as when linking to “/about#something”, it will only go to “/about/”, add the trailing slash automatically, and then add the “#something” afterwords, which doesn’t scroll to that section.

Is there a solution for this?

Read full topic
item.source: Link to anchor tag on different page
